blended.narrative: Norquay is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,594 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
